en: How are my best girlfriends? Hey Mrs. George, this is Katie.
Hello, sweetheart. Hi. Welcome to our home.
I just want you to know, if you need anything, don't be shy, okay?
ko: 필요한 거 있으면 주저하지 말고 말해줘, 알겠지?

en: There are no rules in this house.
I'm not like a regular mom, I'm a cool mom. Right, Regina?
ko: 나는 일반 엄마가 아니야. 나는 쿨한 엄마야. 맞지, 레지나? 제발 그만 말해.

en: Please stop talking. Okay. I'm gonna make you girls a hump day treat.
ko: 좋아. 너희를 위해 수요일 간식을 만들어 줄게.

en: 🎵 Shake friends, all the boys in the yard 🎵
🎵 And their life is better than mine 🎵 This is your room?
It was my parents' room. But I made them trade me.
ko: 원래는 내 부모님 방이었는데, 내가 바꿔 달라고 했어.

en: Katie, do you even know who sings this?
ko: 케이티, 이 노래 누가 부르는지 알아?

en: Um, the Spice Girls? I love her. She's like a Martian.
God, my hips are huge! Oh please, I hate my calves.
I bet you guys can wear halters. I've got man shoulders.
ko: 적어도 너희는 홀터를 입을 수 있어. 나는 남자 어깨가 있어.

en: I used to think there was just fat and skinny. Apparently there's a lot of things that can be wrong on your body.
ko: 예전에는 그냥 뚱뚱한 사람과 마른 사람만 있다고 생각했어.
